acceptanceCriteria: Each element exists as a typed packages/ui export with render + interaction-state tests (default, hover, pressed, focus-visible, disabled, loading, error, empty — only the states that apply to that element)
Tokens originate from packages/theme; no hardcoded colors/spacing in the element implementation
44×44px minimum touch target and visible focus-visible state on every interactive element
prefers-reduced-motion respected in any element with a transition/animation
Vietnamese copy where the element renders text; no English fallback strings
Import-boundary tests confirm these elements are importable by apps/demo and do not import from any apps/*

resolvedDecisions.decision: Implement packages/ui element primitives only; do not build destination screens in this issue.
Keep #397 DestinationCard/PrimaryNavigation exports; add Button, Badge, Chip, HealthBar, ProgressBar families; do not redesign Home compositions.

Bump parent bootstrapRef from 04cb0416c472 to origin/main HEAD f7a1ad23cdc1 so harnessUtility skills resolve against current main. Architect note: pin advance required for #412 Meta routing after #399/#411 landed; skill set unchanged (ui-ux + ui-ux-design).

inScope: packages/ui Chip (status, filter/toggle, input/closeable as design requires)
packages/ui HealthBar (5-segment shop health with threshold ticks + text label)
packages/ui ProgressBar (standard fill + RealEstimated two-segment + reduced-motion)
Vitest interaction-state coverage and import-boundary tests
Theme-token-only styling and Vietnamese copy on rendered text
outOfScope: Screen/composition components (recommendation cards, shop health cards, analytics layouts)
apps/demo destination content beyond import-boundary proof
Backend, auth, live data, deploy, apps/dashboard product changes
promptCacheBlock:
# Issue #412 — packages/ui core elements

## In scope
- Build typed packages/ui elements: Button, Badge, Chip, HealthBar, ProgressBar.
- Interaction-state Vitest coverage; theme tokens only; 44×44 + focus-visible; reduced-motion; Vietnamese text; import-boundary proof for apps/demo.

## Out of scope
- Screen compositions, destination content, backend/auth/deploy, apps/dashboard product edits.

## Edge design docs (load for implementation)
- docs/product/design/Components/buttons.md
- docs/product/design/Components/badges.md
- docs/product/design/Components/chips.md
- docs/product/design/Components/health-bars.md
- docs/product/design/Components/progress-bars.md

phaseCacheBlocks.meta:
# Meta — Issue #412

- Executor domain: ui-ux (single_executor).
- Skills (bootstrap-pinned): domain/ui-ux, standalone/ui-ux-design.
- Do NOT load open-design-system (absent from parent bootstrapRef pin).
- Rules: code-quality, reliability, performance.
- MCPs: none.
- TDD order (one agent, sequential — maximize focus):
  1) Button (+ styles/tokens) with state tests
  2) Badge
  3) Chip (status → filter → input)
  4) ProgressBar (standard → RealEstimated)
  5) HealthBar
  6) Public exports + MODULE.md + import-boundary tests
- Reuse packages/ui/styles.css + packages/theme/tokens.css patterns from DestinationCard.
- Stub packages/ui/src/button.tsx exists but is NOT exported — replace/complete, do not leave orphan stubs.
- Emit implementation-issue-412.json when done; append phaseCacheBlocks.executor.
